name: Derek Tran
subject: unusual question
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120067574/585123778/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYyOGFkMGQtMjRjYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qDhJapVomw9awMf0eUafVMUVhHB-J-9Sx9rauB310xY=)
Tomorrow marks a key fundraising deadline. If your inbox is like mine, you’re seeing _a lot_ of emails from candidates like me asking you to chip in before November ends.

I’ve said this before, but asking for contributions from supporters like you is my least favorite part of the job. **[That’s why today I’m coming to you with a specific ask: will you chip in _any_ amount toward my re-election campaign? Today, the amount you give isn’t important. What matters is that folks click though and contribute what they can – even if it’s just $1.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120067578/585123782/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.29.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYyOGFkMGQtMjRjYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qDhJapVomw9awMf0eUafVMUVhHB-J-9Sx9rauB310xY=)**
| **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120067582/585123786/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.29.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYyOGFkMGQtMjRjYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qDhJapVomw9awMf0eUafVMUVhHB-J-9Sx9rauB310xY=)**
---

I know it seems strange: How can just a few dollars make an impact in a competitive race like mine?

**If everyone reading this email chipped what they could, we would instantly hit our online fundraising goal. Not only would we be better prepared for the attacks to come, we would send an unmistakable message of our grassroots strength in this race.**

I flipped this seat from red to blue in one of the closest races in the country last year – we won by 653 votes. It showed me just how important every vote, and every person, is to our movement.

I’m fighting hard in Congress to deliver for CA-45 and beyond, but I’ll be frank: Without a Democratic majority, it’s extremely difficult to hold this administration accountable.

Protecting this seat is the key to flipping the House. We’re starting our re-election efforts right now, and your support today could truly mean the difference between falling to Republican attacks or rising above the noise and keeping this seat blue.

**[It starts with your donation today. Can I count on you to chip in any amount ahead of tomorrow’s end-of-month fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120067586/585123790/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.29.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYyOGFkMGQtMjRjYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qDhJapVomw9awMf0eUafVMUVhHB-J-9Sx9rauB310xY=)**

clean_body: | = Tomorrow marks a key fundraising deadline. If your inbox is like mine, you’re seeing a lot of emails from candidates like me asking you to chip in before November ends. I’ve said this before, but asking for contributions from supporters like you is my least favorite part of the job. = | = I know it seems strange: How can just a few dollars make an impact in a competitive race like mine? If everyone reading this email chipped what they could, we would instantly hit our online fundraising goal. Not only would we be better prepared for the attacks to come, we would send an unmistakable message of our grassroots strength in this race. I flipped this seat from red to blue in one of the closest races in the country last year – we won by 653 votes. It showed me just how important every vote, and every person, is to our movement. I’m fighting hard in Congress to deliver for CA-45 and beyond, but I’ll be frank: Without a Democratic majority, it’s extremely difficult to hold this administration accountable. Protecting this seat is the key to flipping the House. We’re starting our re-election efforts right now, and your support today could truly mean the difference between falling to Republican attacks or rising above the noise and keeping this seat blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. name: ElectJon.com
subject: This isn’t the first time we’re bringing this up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

🌤️ To all of Jon's supporters, please don't click away. 🇺🇸
This isn’t the first time we're bringing this up, so we'll get right to the point: we're asking you to make a contribution to Jon Ossoff's campaign before his rapidly-approaching end-of-month deadline.

If everyone reading this donated even $10, we not only would have a huge number of donations, but we'd also have the early resources we need to build a winning foundation for Jon's reelection.
And that's important, because MAGA and the GOP have _already_ spent more than $10 million on this race, and at some point there's going to be an _even bigger wave_ of outside money targeting him with attack ads.

Unfortunately, not everyone gives. And the fact that Republicans will have this seat at the very top of their list of targets makes this tough. So Jon is relying on people who understand how important these early donations are to chip in to his campaign today.
Our average online donation is around $30. Many donors give less. Some give more. All that matters is that you're choosing to power this campaign before our end-of-month deadline.

[**If Jon Ossoff winning this race seems worth $10 to you, that's the donation we're asking you to make if you can afford it. Thank you.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251126-2-subs&t=1&akid=1168%2E5691347%2Eb4NrzW)**

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW) Listen, this is your final notice.

We’ve reached out to you over and over again. It’s probably time to give up, but we had to try and reach you one more time.

All we’re asking for is your signature on our petition to [**END _Citizens United_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70064?t=3&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW) before the Supreme Court ruins all of our progress... but you don’t seem to care?!

We thought after we told you how IMPORTANT this was, you would listen — but [**STILL, NOTHING.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70064?t=4&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW)

[**The deadline for our petition is TONIGHT at 11:59PM**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70064?t=5&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW) [**and you are the only Democrat in your area who hasn't responded.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70064?t=6&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW)

[ **Will you PLEASE add your name to our petition to end _Citizens United?_ >> ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70064?t=7&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW) | [SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70064?t=8&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW)
---
Hoping to see your name,

Fight for Reform

**\------ FORWARDED MESSAGE ------
From: Horrible Supreme Court news (Fight For Reform)
Subject: Republicans are thrilled...
To: YOU **

[**HORRIBLE BREAKING NEWS FROM THE SUPREME COURT:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70064?t=9&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW)
[**“Supreme Court agrees to hear Republican-backed effort to lift caps on campaign spending”**

_CNN_ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70064?t=10&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70064?t=11&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW)
---|---

[SIGN NOW TO END _CITIZENS UNITED_ BEFORE THEY RUIN ALL OUR PROGRESS →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70064?t=12&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW)
---
Friend – this could change everything in a TERRIBLE WAY.

This case (backed by Vice President J.D. Vance) would allow BILLIONAIRE DONORS to drop TENS of thousands of dollars into party committees without any caps.

The Supreme Court has already ruled in FAVOR of _Citizens United_ and money in politics. So it’s never been so CRUCIAL that we show WIDESPREAD SUPPORT for getting money OUT of politics once and for all.

That’s why Amy Klobuchar is sounding the alarm:
[]()
[**So please Friend, before it’s too late: Sign to END _Citizens United_ and stop billionaire donors from rigging our elections →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70064?t=13&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW)
[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70064?t=14&akid=23629%2E4449941%2EzojLUW)
---
Thanks,

_Fight for Reform_

one last ask before the deadline

I'm sorry to pester you again, null.

But we're still $7,250 short of our urgent $100,000 goal – and the deadline is at midnight tonight.
Null, I know you support our movement, but could you do me a favor and make your first gift right now? Even $5 or $10 helps. I'd truly be so grateful.
Here's your personalized link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/hs_mw_2025_email_fr/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9238?t=2&akid=1469%2E49239%2EC1M8Ou)**
Thank you so much,
Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9443?t=3&akid=1469%2E49239%2EC1M8Ou) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9241?t=4&akid=1469%2E49239%2EC1M8Ou)

Thank you,
Haley

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Gabby and I like to volunteer at the food bank this time of year
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
What we see over there always gives us a little hope. In the middle of the holiday season, tons of people dedicate some of their time to helping out their neighbors.
#

Hey everybody, Mark Kelly here.
Around this time of year, Gabby and I like to volunteer at the food bank in Tucson. What we see over there always gives us a little hope. In the middle of the holiday season, tons of people dedicate some of their time to helping out their neighbors.
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-afbn/.YDmKuh&refcode=em251126-1-f&t=1&akid=6266%2E6688874%2Else5zd)
This year, more people than usual are going to need help. It’s been a tough one, and a dollar isn’t going as far as it used to at the grocery store.
That’s as true here in Arizona as it is anywhere else.
And that’s why I’m writing to you.
[**I’m hoping you’ll take a minute and make a donation to the Arizona Food Bank Network. It’s a great organization, and Thanksgiving is one of their busiest times. They need all the help they can get.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-afbn/.YDmKuh&refcode=em251126-1-f&t=2&akid=6266%2E6688874%2Else5zd)

name: Team Saikat
subject: A quick note of gratitude
body:
We’re wishing you nothing but the best this Thanksgiving

| | | | | [|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=b6b2691363&e=bf17056ae8)
| | | | | |

Friends -
As Thanksgiving fast approaches, we wanted to take a second to say _Thank You, truly.
_
Whether you’ve chatted with neighbors at a farmers market, knocked on doors, attended a town hall, chipped in a few bucks, or even just asked a question or tuned into this race, supporters like you make this campaign possible. We could not be more grateful.

But we also know this holiday is complicated. For many Indigenous communities, today is a day of mourning and remembrance — a reminder of the violence, displacement, and broken promises that shaped this country. We honor that truth, and we stand in solidarity with Indigenous people here in the Bay Area and across the country fighting for sovereignty, safety, and dignity.

And across the country, thousands of families are struggling with something that should be unimaginable in a nation as wealthy as ours: hunger. Our food banks are stretched thin; lines are long, parents are skipping meals so their kids can eat. Groups like the [**SF-Marin Food Bank**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=4c4181a092&e=bf17056ae8) continue to meet an enormous need, but no family should have to rely on charity to put food on the table in the first place.

These are heavy times, but it is such a privilege to spend our days connecting with neighbors in San Francisco and fighting for a new kind of politics: one where working people, rather than billionaires and party insiders, shape our policies and the Democratic party.

We’re grateful to do that work alongside you, Friends.

Wishing you and your families nothing but the best this Thanksgiving! 🦃

Gratefully,
Zack, Emily, Alex, Natalia, Kevin, and all of us on Team Saikat
---
| | | | | | | | |

---
|
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/about?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&e=bf17056ae8&c=3c77a67509) [unsubscribe from this list](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&t=b&e=bf17056ae8&c=3c77a67509) [update subscription preferences](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&e=bf17056ae8&c=3c77a67509)
Saikat for Congress * 1388 Haight St PMB 1124 * San Francisco, CA 94117-2909 * USA

---

name: Brad Finstad
subject: From my family to yours — Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Friend, As we gather with our families this week, I want to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a very Happy Thanksgiving. This season always reminds me of how blessed we are, not just for the harvest and the communities we call home, but for the friendships and support that bind us together. I’m grateful every day for the opportunity to serve the place I’ve called home my entire life, and for the trust you’ve placed in me to be your voice. I hope your Thanksgiving is filled with good food, good company, and time to reflect on the things that matter most. Jackie and I will be doing the same with our children and extended family, and yes, plenty of leftovers! Thank you again for all you do to make our communities strong. May God bless you and your family this Thanksgiving and in the joyous season ahead. Warmly, Brad
---
| | |
---

subject: You’re not going to believe this poll:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Early voting in Tennessee’s 7th District ends today , and the newest polls show just how close this is: Democrat Aftyn Behn 46%, MAGA Matt Van Epps 48%, with 5% undecided. When leaners are included, it’s still a razor-thin 49–47 race!
Peter, this election will be decided by turnout, plain and simple.
Republican-aligned billionaires have already dumped $6 million into this race because they know Behn’s message to make sure kids don't go hungry, roads are fixed, and hospitals are funded -- is breaking through with young voters, women, and independents who now disapprove of Trump 59–34.
But we need resources in these final days to reach every voter who might stay home. If you can, please chip in to fuel our turnout push in TN-07: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11262025]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11262025]
This race is winnable, and your support right now could be the difference in a historic upset!
Wishing you and your loved ones a warm, peaceful Thanksgiving.
GOTV PAC Team
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

clean_body: [] Peter , Early voting in Tennessee’s 7th District ends today , and the newest polls show just how close this is: Democrat Aftyn Behn 46%, MAGA Matt Van Epps 48%, with 5% undecided. When leaners are included, it’s still a razor-thin 49–47 race! Peter, this election will be decided by turnout, plain and simple. Republican-aligned billionaires have already dumped $6 million into this race because they know Behn’s message to make sure kids don't go hungry, roads are fixed, and hospitals are funded -- is breaking through with young voters, women, and independents who now disapprove of Trump 59–34. But we need resources in these final days to reach every voter who might stay home. If you can, please chip in to fuel our turnout push in TN-07: [] Donate Now [] This race is winnable, and your support right now could be the difference in a historic upset! Wishing you and your loved ones a warm, peaceful Thanksgiving. GOTV PAC Team [] Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts. Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member. Earlier this year, Donald Trump signed an executive order to end public funding of NPR and PBS – slashing nearly $1.1 billion.

This, compiled with his increasing attacks on journalists and media organizations that publish information that doesn’t align with his MAGA agenda,**puts public broadcasting at an existential threat.**

But with Trump’s public broadcasting cuts still under legal review, we still have a chance to save it.

**[We need a massive wave of support for it to be possible, that’s why we’re asking: Could you please sign our petition to defend public broadcasting organizations like NPR and PBS before tonight? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120068521/585156689/-318400792?refcode=NDCAF_20251126_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGY4Njk2YS0yY2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xdbRKnQp5amgH35LxhRCVgzTC5gi86lOWnddb4PehsE=&emci=40575703-e6ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=90f8696a-2ccb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=48524772)**

name: Voter Research [Voter Action Project]
subject: Your view on Trump's tariffs?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
AP: Fear that Trump tariffs will spark recession wipes out more than $2 trillion in value from US stocks [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/AP_TrumpTariffMarketRecession.png]
Team: President Donald Trump has repeatedly slapped sweeping tariffs on foreign imports. Nearly every time, the stock market reacted with major losses, including the biggest one-day drop since the pandemic flattened the global economy.
Many economists have said these tariffs are much worse than expected, and investors have dumped shares in companies they predict will suffer most from what is effectively a business tax. In many cases that tax will be passed on to consumers.
“ This is a game changer, not only for the U.S. economy but for the global economy, ” Olu Sonola, Fitch Ratings’ head of U.S. Economic Research, said in a report. “ Many countries will likely end up in a recession. ”
We would like to hear from more voters in your area on this issue. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Are you worried that Trump's tariffs are tanking our economy and making our goods more expensive?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=112625_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=112625_2no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112625_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112625_2&amount=20]

Hey folks,
Aftyn Behn is less than a week out from what could be one of the biggest political upsets of the year--and she's doing it in a deep red district (TN-07) by running straight at the issues people care about. You'll want to hear this interview before you unplug for the holiday break.
* [00:00:49] Aftyn breaks down why a Republican stronghold is suddenly in play--and what that says about the moment we're in.
* [00:02:08] The story of a Republican voter comparing her to Trump... and why that authenticity is resonating across party lines.
* [00:03:04] From Medicaid rallies to the statehouse: how years of grassroots organizing led to this campaign.
* [00:07:03] What she's hearing on the ground--from veterans, working moms, and disillusioned voters--in the final days of the race.
* [00:11:02] Aftyn on feeding kids, fixing roads, and the radical idea that government should actually help people.

**[If you enjoyed this interview, become a paid subscriber to Endless Urgency today to support our work.](https://substack.com/redirect/efa28c97-dcbe-4b6e-ad65-74825c8b4f28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike
P.S. Happy Thanksgiving! I appreciate every single one of you.

body:
| We’ve reached a vitally urgent moment.

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: 2025 November e-newsletter
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=c0babbc643&u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=7c5fb6ff4b)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | **2025 November e-newsletter**
####

**Happy Thanksgiving!**
##
---
|
* **IHSS providers are the backbone of care for the most vulnerable**
* **Landmark deal to lock in affordable housing into the 22 nd Century**
* **Kaiser joins crusade to combat epidemic of loneliness**
* **Local food banks need extra help during the season of giving**
* **Annual turkey giveaway kicks off the holidays**

---
| | |
---
|
# “This county should be extraordinarily proud for identifying and investing in this transit-rich project that can prevent displacement and homelessness for our most vulnerable residents into the 22nd Century,”
# **\- President David Canepa**
---
| | | | **2025 November e-newsletter** **Annual turkey giveaway kicks off the holidays** Dear friends, I was proud to partner with Friends of Old Town in a longstanding annual tradition to give free turkeys to people who need them most at the Morelos Hall in South San Francisco Saturday, Nov. 22. Old Town is one of South San Francisco’s oldest and most vibrant neighborhoods and the people who live there are some of the most welcoming and gracious. But many in this working-class community are older adults, some isolated and lonely, and others who are food insecure. For the last seven years we have delivered turkeys to the community of “Old South City”. This is special to me because this is where my grandmother Liliana Torres grew up 85 years ago. Every year, this drive brings people together, not just to donate food, but to share hope, connection, and compassion with our neighbors who need it most. The Turkey Drive has always meant a great deal to me because South San Francisco is a community built on tradition, generosity and people looking out for one another. During the holiday season, when loneliness and food insecurity weigh heavily on many families, this event reminds us of the importance of showing up for one another. A huge thank-you to the incredible team making this possible once again including Hermes Monzon, Brittany Burgo, and Dana Abarca with Friends of Old Town; Local 12’s Anthony Nuane; Local 913’s Joe Sanders; Local 718’s Max Snelling; Desiree Green from the San Mateo Labor Council; Bart Pantoja from the San Mateo County Building & Construction Trade Council; Oscar Gamez from the Sociedad Mutualista Mexicana Morelos Inc.; Carlos Martinez, international representative of IUPAT; and Jesus Galvan from Morelos Your commitment to uplifting our community is inspiring, and your hard work ensures that families across San Mateo County can celebrate the holidays with dignity and joy. **Local food banks need extra help during the season of giving** While some families in San Mateo County are starting to see SNAP benefits back on their EBT cards, ongoing delays for some recipients have food banks scrambling to put food on the table for those in need as the holidays approach. In San Mateo County, 35,000 residents rely on SNAP benefits including approximately 25,000 children and 5,600 seniors. While San Mateo County has committed nearly $900,000 to support our local food banks during this emergency, we cannot do it alone and will need the community to rally around local food banks and assistance programs to try to fill in the gaps, so no child or senior goes hungry as winter approaches. The ongoing lapse in federal funding for the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program has created a severe and immediate hardship for many families in our county. Thousands of residents who rely on these benefits to meet their basic nutritional needs are now facing uncertainty and food insecurity. If you or a loved needs emergency food support or if you want to help, go to: [https://www.smcgov.org/foodnow](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=4480e39082&e=c0babbc643 "https://www.smcgov.org/foodnow"). In north San Mateo County, the Daly City Community Service Center at 350 90th St. in Daly City serves residents from Daly City, Broadmoor and Colma and can be reached at (650) 301-3300 if you want to volunteer or are in need of assistance. Brisbane, San Bruno and South San Francisco residents can access food or volunteer at the YMCA Community Resource Center at 1486 Huntington Ave. and can be reached at (650) 271-3850. As the holidays approach, now is the time to look out for our neighbors to ensure their children are fed and that they are not left behind as the government shutdown has cut off their critical food assistance. **Kaiser joins crusade to combat epidemic of loneliness** Momentum is growing across California to take on the epidemic of loneliness. Kaiser Permanente hosted the first of its kind Aging Well Summit at the historic Henry J. Kaiser Center for the Arts in Oakland, and I was honored to speak about the loneliness crisis and the power of social connection as we age. I was honored to share the stage with UCSF Dr. Carla Perissinotto and Village Movement California Board Member Carlene Davis prior to keynote speaker Rita Moreno taking the stage to discuss “redefining the journey of aging.” As we continue to push to redefine the journey of aging, we must do all we can to support the millions of Californians who confront loneliness and social isolation every day. As older adults are becoming a significantly larger portion of the state’s population, I’m proud to be a champion for the for the mental wellness of our aging population and that starts with social connection. About 53% of San Mateo County residents report feeling lonely. Loneliness affects people of all genders and ages, and anyone can experience it. By 2030, more than 8.7 million Californians will be 65 and older. We must make sure they’re not just living longer but living well, connected, and supported. San Mateo County made history in 2024 as the first in the nation to declare loneliness a public health crisis. My mission is to continue creating events that bring people together and combat loneliness across San Mateo County. **Landmark deal to lock in affordable housing into the 22 nd Century** San Mateo County has taken a major, transformative step to protect our most vulnerable residents and expand deeply affordable housing in Daly City. In November, we officially purchased the property at 493 Eastmoor Ave. for $4.4 million, unlocking the path to building 72 units of 100% affordable housing for households earning 20%–50% of the area median income. These homes won’t just serve today’s families; they’ll remain affordable for nearly a century, creating stability for generations. I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again, our county should be extraordinarily proud of identifying and investing in this transit-rich, community-centered project. This is exactly the kind of bold action that prevents displacement, keeps families housed, and stops homelessness before it starts. By purchasing the property, we’re enabling the developer to secure the tax credits and financing necessary to bring this project to life. And the best part? No new funds were required. The $4.4 million was already allocated as part of our commitment to affordable housing. Now, with county ownership and a long-term lease in place, 55 years with an option for 44 more, we are ensuring long-term affordability and long-term stability. This is how we build a future where everyone has a place to call home. This is putting community first, and this is the San Mateo County we can all be proud of. **IHSS providers are the backbone of care for the most vulnerable** The San Mateo County Board of Supervisors recognized Nov. 18 as In-Home Supportive Services (IHSS) Providers Day. Our 8,000 IHSS providers are the backbone of care in our community. They help seniors and people with disabilities live safely, comfortably, and with dignity in their own homes. They prevent loneliness and isolation. They support independence. And they save taxpayers millions of dollars by reducing the need for institutional care. Most importantly, they give something you can’t measure in dollars, compassion. The majority of our caregivers are women of color and immigrants, and they show up every single day with strength, skill, and heart. They cook meals, manage medications, assist with mobility, and provide essential and deeply personal support. They become trusted companions. They become lifelines. Our Board of Supervisors is committed to standing with IHSS providers, protecting the programs they make possible, and urging our state and federal partners to invest in quality care and quality jobs. To every IHSS provider in San Mateo County, we thank you.
**Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=8933e99822&e=c0babbc643 "https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9?fbclid=IwAR3YFH0mH828rtAUru5EFOO9GsMCasQYe1N7AUrmwAwBf30JTtXOSeCzKjs"). clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | 2025 November e-newsletter Happy Thanksgiving! | IHSS providers are the backbone of care for the most vulnerable Landmark deal to lock in affordable housing into the 22 nd Century Kaiser joins crusade to combat epidemic of loneliness Local food banks need extra help during the season of giving Annual turkey giveaway kicks off the holidays | | | | “This county should be extraordinarily proud for identifying and investing in this transit-rich project that can prevent displacement and homelessness for our most vulnerable residents into the 22nd Century,” \- President David Canepa | | | | 2025 November e-newsletter Annual turkey giveaway kicks off the holidays Dear friends, I was proud to partner with Friends of Old Town in a longstanding annual tradition to give free turkeys to people who need them most at the Morelos Hall in South San Francisco Saturday, Nov. 22. Old Town is one of South San Francisco’s oldest and most vibrant neighborhoods and the people who live there are some of the most welcoming and gracious. But many in this working-class community are older adults, some isolated and lonely, and others who are food insecure. For the last seven years we have delivered turkeys to the community of “Old South City”. This is special to me because this is where my grandmother Liliana Torres grew up 85 years ago. Every year, this drive brings people together, not just to donate food, but to share hope, connection, and compassion with our neighbors who need it most. The Turkey Drive has always meant a great deal to me because South San Francisco is a community built on tradition, generosity and people looking out for one another. During the holiday season, when loneliness and food insecurity weigh heavily on many families, this event reminds us of the importance of showing up for one another. A huge thank-you to the incredible team making this possible once again including Hermes Monzon, Brittany Burgo, and Dana Abarca with Friends of Old Town; Local 12’s Anthony Nuane; Local 913’s Joe Sanders; Local 718’s Max Snelling; Desiree Green from the San Mateo Labor Council; Bart Pantoja from the San Mateo County Building & Construction Trade Council; Oscar Gamez from the Sociedad Mutualista Mexicana Morelos Inc.; Carlos Martinez, international representative of IUPAT; and Jesus Galvan from Morelos Your commitment to uplifting our community is inspiring, and your hard work ensures that families across San Mateo County can celebrate the holidays with dignity and joy. Local food banks need extra help during the season of giving While some families in San Mateo County are starting to see SNAP benefits back on their EBT cards, ongoing delays for some recipients have food banks scrambling to put food on the table for those in need as the holidays approach. In San Mateo County, 35,000 residents rely on SNAP benefits including approximately 25,000 children and 5,600 seniors. While San Mateo County has committed nearly $900,000 to support our local food banks during this emergency, we cannot do it alone and will need the community to rally around local food banks and assistance programs to try to fill in the gaps, so no child or senior goes hungry as winter approaches. The ongoing lapse in federal funding for the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program has created a severe and immediate hardship for many families in our county. Thousands of residents who rely on these benefits to meet their basic nutritional needs are now facing uncertainty and food insecurity. If you or a loved needs emergency food support or if you want to help, go to: "". In north San Mateo County, the Daly City Community Service Center at 350 90th St. in Daly City serves residents from Daly City, Broadmoor and Colma and can be reached at (650) 301-3300 if you want to volunteer or are in need of assistance. Brisbane, San Bruno and South San Francisco residents can access food or volunteer at the YMCA Community Resource Center at 1486 Huntington Ave. and can be reached at (650) 271-3850. As the holidays approach, now is the time to look out for our neighbors to ensure their children are fed and that they are not left behind as the government shutdown has cut off their critical food assistance. Kaiser joins crusade to combat epidemic of loneliness Momentum is growing across California to take on the epidemic of loneliness. Kaiser Permanente hosted the first of its kind Aging Well Summit at the historic Henry J. Kaiser Center for the Arts in Oakland, and I was honored to speak about the loneliness crisis and the power of social connection as we age. I was honored to share the stage with UCSF Dr. Carla Perissinotto and Village Movement California Board Member Carlene Davis prior to keynote speaker Rita Moreno taking the stage to discuss “redefining the journey of aging.” As we continue to push to redefine the journey of aging, we must do all we can to support the millions of Californians who confront loneliness and social isolation every day. As older adults are becoming a significantly larger portion of the state’s population, I’m proud to be a champion for the for the mental wellness of our aging population and that starts with social connection. About 53% of San Mateo County residents report feeling lonely. Loneliness affects people of all genders and ages, and anyone can experience it. By 2030, more than 8.7 million Californians will be 65 and older. We must make sure they’re not just living longer but living well, connected, and supported. San Mateo County made history in 2024 as the first in the nation to declare loneliness a public health crisis. My mission is to continue creating events that bring people together and combat loneliness across San Mateo County. Landmark deal to lock in affordable housing into the 22 nd Century San Mateo County has taken a major, transformative step to protect our most vulnerable residents and expand deeply affordable housing in Daly City. In November, we officially purchased the property at 493 Eastmoor Ave. for $4.4 million, unlocking the path to building 72 units of 100% affordable housing for households earning 20%–50% of the area median income. These homes won’t just serve today’s families; they’ll remain affordable for nearly a century, creating stability for generations. I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again, our county should be extraordinarily proud of identifying and investing in this transit-rich, community-centered project. This is exactly the kind of bold action that prevents displacement, keeps families housed, and stops homelessness before it starts. By purchasing the property, we’re enabling the developer to secure the tax credits and financing necessary to bring this project to life. And the best part? No new funds were required. The $4.4 million was already allocated as part of our commitment to affordable housing. Now, with county ownership and a long-term lease in place, 55 years with an option for 44 more, we are ensuring long-term affordability and long-term stability. This is how we build a future where everyone has a place to call home. This is putting community first, and this is the San Mateo County we can all be proud of. IHSS providers are the backbone of care for the most vulnerable The San Mateo County Board of Supervisors recognized Nov. 18 as In-Home Supportive Services (IHSS) Providers Day. Our 8,000 IHSS providers are the backbone of care in our community. They help seniors and people with disabilities live safely, comfortably, and with dignity in their own homes. They prevent loneliness and isolation. They support independence. And they save taxpayers millions of dollars by reducing the need for institutional care. Most importantly, they give something you can’t measure in dollars, compassion. The majority of our caregivers are women of color and immigrants, and they show up every single day with strength, skill, and heart. They cook meals, manage medications, assist with mobility, and provide essential and deeply personal support. They become trusted companions. They become lifelines. Our Board of Supervisors is committed to standing with IHSS providers, protecting the programs they make possible, and urging our state and federal partners to invest in quality care and quality jobs. To every IHSS provider in San Mateo County, we thank you. Interns wanted to join our team We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: "". You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org "mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org". In friendship, DAVID J. CANEPA President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors | | | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Supervisor David Canepa 1618 Sullivan 497 Daly City, CA 94015 * USA

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: They Called It a Facade Tribal Elders Break Silence on 100M Dollars Government Fraud We Just Exposed
body:
I’ve spent my life going undercover to shine light on corruption most journalists are afraid to touch. But nothing prepared me for the raw pain I witnessed on the Susanville Indian Rancheria.

| [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmc0c3849tosljgcb9if2khtd65i20q4hbet81do_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm8oj2cth2bs)
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmc6a2cdlibgmhmbukftuhkq9mqt5ehf7tjsiv1g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm8oj2cth2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've spent my life going undercover to shine light on corruption most journalists are afraid to touch.

But nothing prepared me for the raw pain I witnessed on the Susanville Indian Rancheria.

Tribal elders - proud Native Americans - sat across from my hidden camera and **fought back tears** as they learned outsiders had used their tribe's name to pocket **over $100 million** in no-bid federal contracts... while their own people lived without basic insulation in their homes or proper healthcare for their elders.

One grandmother told us:

**" We don't benefit a single dime from any of that. Why do our elders have to suffer with no healthcare? ...They just ripped us off. They need to be in jail."**

Another elder called it straight: **" All a facade... They're using us as rented Indians."**

These are not paid actors. These are real tribal members who discovered - because of **OMG 's undercover investigation** - that their sacred sovereignty was being sold out from under them.

[**Watch the heartbreaking footage for yourself right now**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgtpjj2ri6ffq7ag5toli9oqo0rqpgcgp8metdng_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm8oj2cth2bs)

What you're seeing is the human cost of a broken federal program that was supposed to help disadvantaged tribes... but instead lined the pockets of connected insiders.

We didn't just expose the scheme - tribal members stood up at their council meeting and **thanked OMG by name** for finally giving them a voice.

But exposing corruption is only step one.

Step two is **holding them accountable** - and that fight is just beginning.

We're already digging deeper, filing records requests, and preparing follow-ups that will force answers from the Small Business Administration and the contractors involved.

None of this happens without courageous patriots like you.

Will you stand with the Susanville tribal members today and help us demand justice?

**_[**Donate $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can right now to fuel this investigation**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6dg8k08cjmevh6egklhaes2k4r59qpcvmfqqcro_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm8oj2cth2bs)_**.

Every dollar you give goes directly to boots-on-the-ground journalism that the mainstream media refuses to do.

Because of supporters like you, real Native voices are finally being heard - and real change is coming.

Thank you for having the courage to fight with us.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. One elder looked straight into our hidden camera and pleaded: **" Please help us. Please give us a voice."** You can answer that plea today to [**help OMG keep going**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqe393ergc9rn7n2pgm1vl3k8e89phed356q4pt8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm8oj2cth2bs).

---

---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl4f5n6tvek6sl0sbliputsahlvftsolgke6l09g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm8oj2clh2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---

**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z19qb64kaa7p9g6m92h0rf2um4nevsuddumn0v38_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm8oj2clh2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7cctc8ama53aimmlp2gpuvm6qmt799th8tgm038_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm8oj2clh2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_****today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3tpbnhpjnqjt3alrc5ssv7bdsrgehrchcs1ft9g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm8oj2clh2bs)

---
Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies.Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

name: Suzanne Beecher
subject: Asking for your prayers
body:
She’s fighting censorship at the Supreme Court

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi8c4llu7jc048fatheagvc85je4ih38g3kjab3o_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm2o72c5h2bs)

## **[Sign Your Name to Commit to Pray for Kaley's Supreme Court Case](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd905krkn8rafd5lth73oaofhsjn8ml2qt6o1h6g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm2o72c5h2bs)**
Dear Fellow American, We're less than a month away from one of the biggest free speech cases at the U.S. Supreme Court!

Kaley Chiles will stand alongside her ADF attorneys to challenge a Colorado law that censors her speech in counseling conversations. It forbids licensed counselors like Kaley from having conversations that could help clients regain comfort with their sex--_even if that 's the client's goal._

It's a clear violation of the First Amendment. But this case also points to a much deeper, spiritual battle.

Laws like this one allow lies to spread--lies like one's sex can be changed and God makes mistakes with His creation. And these laws suppress truth from going forward by forbidding people like Kaley from speaking it.

Kaley is stepping up to challenge this law. And a win in her case could help roll back similar laws in 22 other states.

**I want you to think about that for a moment. One young woman 's courageous stand could reach countless lives with the truth.**

I've had the privilege of getting to know Kaley over the last few months, and I have been so encouraged by her unwavering hope in the Lord and commitment to the truth.

It's not been an easy road. The law threatens exorbitant fines and even loss of her license if she follows her convictions in the counseling room. She's also facing tremendous backlash for choosing to push back on this law--and more is sure to come. Our enemy, the father of lies, will work to oppose the truth and those who speak it at every turn.

But your prayers can make a difference. As we prepare for oral argument in Kaley's case on October 7th, will you please pray...
* **For Kaley** -- that God would strengthen and encourage her in the weeks leading up to her case, and that she would sense His peace in the months to come as we await the Court's decision
* **For her ADF attorneys** --that they would have clarity of mind and speech as they go to the Supreme Court, and that they would represent the Lord and our clients well
* **For our culture** --that God would use this case to open more eyes to the harms of gender ideology, and that hearts would turn toward the truth of knowing Him

**__**
[ Commit to Pray](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhe3ad026k3p35o7gphjii4b50qi7p3olrep7rjo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm2o72c5h2bs)

Thank you for your prayers--it's such an encouragement to know that friends like you are going to the Lord on our behalf!

In Christ, **Suzanne Beecher**
Legal Counsel
Alliance Defending Freedom

P.S. [Please sign your name to let Kaley and our ADF team know that you're praying for them as we prepare for this case at the U.S. Supreme Court!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ju1afi1lbgtasag2q6c0quon87iro5sdh2lbn0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm2o72c5h2bs)

---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5u3r94ua9m9qcbqr0c6qrdbfufg3nprv57afmu0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6aoj4shie1oh1k8gn48n24hjm6ob2c5gm1oj1c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zurks3rav3kb673freh8msnavb7gpgk06dads9ag_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm2o72c5h2bs)_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zudbtd33oq1m7h9kim5v9rmr0h52298hdkq4schg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob1chh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zag7d4bae7hhgao4bad925a50mn5o4c0bmapnfqo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob1chh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zerqsfef7mj57sbq4im231fiop0f597rg675plfo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob1chh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zblpqt433854qshtkjomgga6idao033s65rh0jfo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob1chh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zht2r8kjhqv0fs7gfag58l3dmqkjc4htjasj0i0g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob1chh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6rk4kbg8b9a7c3pgu09lt1oavbsd1q3lvt766j0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob1chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zccs0kpr7kn40e5jmp0ivdsdtvu73j3bbviom9p0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob1chh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbbc1qr9cdplfor6d7fvpm3v8h8l469kgdqbf2f0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob1chh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Lawrence Reed
subject: A troubling milestone for America
body:
Gallup recently released data showing a worrisome trend: a growing positive perception of socialism.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk94u7ntqgskk9t6gu3hg67efccc88f3bo8aqae0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs) Friend,

Gallup recently released data showing a worrisome trend: a growing positive perception of socialism.

This news shows us that many people today have a profound misunderstanding of history and human nature.

When people think that socialism means “fairness” or “sharing,” they forget what it really entails: **state control over individual choice, innovation, and opportunity.**

The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has been warning about the dangers and failures of socialism for nearly 80 years. **Our mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society.**

If you’ve never donated to FEE, or if it’s been over a year since your last gift, a member of FEE’s Board will DOUBLE — or even TRIPLE — your donation!
[MATCH MY GIFT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsat3vjlbt3okc95f968pb9ona9n4ah89asqsa08_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)
[To help share these truths, I’d like to send you a digital copy of _Reflections on the Failure of Socialism_ — a powerful book we use to show young people what history has already proven about socialism’s empty promises — when you donate today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z52td4nt9lsi37ackt85lappfjb49rpf8fm88mk8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm9972fjbeflg9352t2hpqncvavs8qn5f04uaem0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)
As Max Eastman warns in his book: _“Yearning to do good and obsessed by the power of the state to do it... they are destroying in the name of social welfare the foundations of freedom.”_

At FEE, we know that liberty must be chosen, learned, and lived anew in every generation. This is why sparking curiosity, deepening understanding, and building future advocates for liberty is at the heart of everything we do.

**Through our classroom programs, teacher training, online content, and transformative in-person events, we teach young people the truth!**

We’re showing them that:
* Innovation and voluntary exchange create prosperity for everyone.
* Central planning and government control lead to poverty, stagnation, and oppression.
* Freedom is both a moral and practical necessity for human dignity and opportunity.

One of the tools we use to teach these lessons is _**Reflections on the Failure of Socialism**_. This powerful book shows students, with history and logic, why socialism fails — again and again — and why freedom works. [And I will send you a FREE digital copy of the book when you donate today. As a bonus, your first-time gift will be MATCHED!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z15u4hbdsrspteceinnllmlf61eq054oe7mik2ao_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)
[Donate $35 → $70](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztn1pledbn9glrh12shiplhv2n88m5s4of6pfu7g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)

[Donate $50 → $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvomvgqmfdq4jectsi0i9h4matmd7lt6q91ofc2o_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)

[Donate $100 → $200](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi60vmo26v49lalcrtm1pp4sukoimr6db6h6ltoo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)

[Donate $500 → $1,000](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z78avmvjj162tvv6fek42ci2hrbcd2t3o0akm4n8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)

[Donate $1,0000 → $3,000](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlg7b8f8pa0fpjvn84q2pgtlcp0hsngb1biofuh0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)

[Donate $1,500 → $4,500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdblgg16a3rpgppe4sb4b4jbchnpgk1m4b14njl8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1bq8kef4ihb0s8jmstgkusg0g1b7fq6l15t46d0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)
Back in the 1980s, long before I became President Emeritus of FEE, I was a young American in Poland, determined to bring the ideas of liberty to those trapped behind the Iron Curtain.

I didn’t just see the failures of socialism firsthand — I lived among them.

I remember seeing fear in people’s eyes — fear of speaking their minds, fear of their own government.

There were empty shelves and full prisons.

**I saw that under socialism, everyone was equal... equally poor, equally powerless, equally oppressed.**

When I finally came home, I made a promise: I would spend the rest of my life teaching others what socialism really means — and why freedom is the only system that allows humanity to flourish.

Because if we don’t equip young people with these truths, they risk repeating these mistakes.

[You can help FEE show young people what history has already proven about socialism’s empty promises by donating today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z12kjtsdt1g5leoakrt20r71huql61opvj9lbmi0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7alk53e7upecgvm24b924dss0ekpaj24ve04fjo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)
In liberty,

Lawrence W. Reed
President Emeritus, Humphreys Family Senior Fellow, and Ron Manners Global Ambassador for Liberty

**P.S.** **LIMITED-TIME MATCH!** If you’ve never donated to FEE — or if it’s been a year since your last gift — a member of FEE’s Board will **MATCH** your donation. Gifts under $1,000 will be **DOUBLED** , and gifts between $1,000-$5,000 will be **TRIPLED**.
[Get Your Donation MATCHED](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z29l8mfupk1bhl2snjlkt76klf6edlg6laujomng_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._
---

_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za7vc4s70balkoki0v9t3fvpmu5r4pg5fc0qbbo8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp35c9ie4oj4s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuh6re00lss4s5s09ebpq307f79jke5m6pf3lbdo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc177iu8k2b2qm8b6vrr0b4ed66o6nif3e2l5gjo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c9gm1ob6clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: I’m thankful for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter,

Happy Thanksgiving! I hope you have a wonderful day with your loved ones full of delicious food and excellent company. I can’t wait to sit down and enjoy a feast with my family later today.

I announced earlier this month that I’m running for reelection in California’s new 3rd Congressional District because I’m committed to doing everything I can to help Democrats take back the House — even if it means taking on a tougher race. I’ve been humbled by the outpouring of support since my announcement. I know that with people like you on my team, **I’m confident that we can win this race and flip the House blue next November.**

As we pause for the holiday, it’s important to remember the folks in our communities who might not have a hot meal waiting for them tonight. The Trump administration has done everything in its power to shred our social safety net and enact deep cuts to programs for the most vulnerable among us. [**If you can, I hope you’ll join me in giving non-perishable food or making a donation to Sacramento Food Bank and Family Services.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120071649/585172121/1537790662?source=EM_NBI_AB_20251127_EN_Thanksgiving_0_12MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWYxYTMwYS02YWNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJygnFyMNV68URMkmRHHSHBBkZdPFBx9SfgkdjbMTio=&emci=aaa64d21-f1ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=5ef1a30a-6acb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=32394541#!/donation/checkout)

Thank you again for all your support and I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving!

With gratitude,

Dr. Ami Bera

name: TPUSA Faith
subject: Happy Thanksgiving from TPUSA Faith 🦃
body:
We are so thankful for you!
|
---
Dear Peter, As we enter this Thanksgiving season, our hearts are full. We are continually reminded of the abundant gifts God has placed in our lives, and you are among them. Scripture calls us to “give thanks to the Lord, for He is good; His love endures forever” (Psalm 107:1), and we feel that deeply as we reflect on this community. We are incredibly grateful for all of you who have shared your faith journey with us, submitted a prayer request, sought connection with a Regional Manager, or reached out to let us know you’re praying for us. Your messages have not gone unnoticed. They are shared with the team as encouragement, and we are praying for each of you. Thank you for allowing us to be a daily part of your lives. This fall has been a season of extraordinary growth. A couple hundred Faith Groups and hundreds of thousands of new pastors are now seeking to be a part of the mission. What a blessing to see God expanding His work through leaders and believers like you! As Thanksgiving approaches, we encourage you to slow down, unplug, and savor time with your family and loved ones. Spend time in the Word, in prayer, and in gratitude for all God has done and all He continues to do. May we continue to “rejoice always, pray continually, and give thanks in all circumstances” (1 Thessalonians 5:16–18).
---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/MWbYXPQP5YSW6qk-_T7R9FxZW7zr5cm5GnzhyN3kz7F63m2nnW8wLKSR6lZ3mzW54cl4g1G2MmfN3Jw4ZmyhvHnW29ZMg950hQ0vW538H102r3CbMW3qk8qR6c4dFCW1QLZDp63nLjDW4rnlw_3lvzssVdWn0c97SQvhVQ3w1R5lTzfPW8BCXW08Hd9QxW8ZN-CP4JfvYNW7yz6vY96PDvrW1G6Ykh67XXHwW7Xh5My8RCdDfW5s6Vdk5Z-DRRW8Q79t13SmKnyW8Q61NN78kGV5W5Mh9182J8fTzW4_NCrB1X0s7PW388CX41x21YCW5C0PPz3J0k7FW6SrR2j1s87cNW72FxHR3H0__PW7KKdrw21M5dlW1580m46tYBnJW10PpJx3gk5DCW18VQ7X5HVGBcV6GqF-22Lqz3dzX3hY04)

subject: Happy Thanksgiving, Peter!

Today, I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude for your support!

Happy Thanksgiving, Peter!
As we gather with family and friends today, I want to express my heartfelt gratitude for your support and for trusting me to serve as your Congressman.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDg4MjgxNTEsImUiOiJtZy1lbmM6NWh6RDRoYmhSOTR0SVViRGFVQXlzUGowaHcxSkVGa0EiLCJyaSI6IjI4OTktZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyNTMzMS02YzU5ZmFiMzBjYmI0ZmY4ODQ3NmZkNWFkNGZjYjdkMSIsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJ0cm95ZG93bmluZy5jb20_ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUxMTI3X0ZRLVpQLjExMDExN190MTc2MTcxNi0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MTEyN19GUS1aUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjE3MTYtMjg5OSJ9/Ms2Hi0Yjrs70rhjVTAfpVg)Thanksgiving is a time to reflect on our blessings, and at the top of my list are dedicated supporters like you. Representing you in Congress is a true honor, and I remain committed to working tirelessly to deliver the meaningful change you and your family deserve.

From my family to yours, I wish you a season filled with joy, love, and gratitude.

name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: What I'm grateful for this morning
body:
| | | | |
---
|
Peter,
As I sit down with my family this morning, looking at the table full of food and the people I love, my heart is overflowing. But the thing I am most thankful for this year isn't on the table--it's the community that surrounds it.
It's you. This past year, you have shown me that this is so much more than a campaign for a seat. It is a campaign for our neighbors.
---
|
---

I've watched this community turn compassion into a fighting force.
When ICE raided our streets and federal agents came to Chicago, you didn't hide. You stood shoulder-to-shoulder with neighbors you'd never met. You helped educate local businesses on their rights. You shielded the vulnerable from fear.
When the government shut down and SNAP benefits stalled, you didn't wait for permission to help. You are the ones who turned our office into a donation center for local foodbanks. You filled the gap that broken politics left behind, ensuring that families right here in our district didn't go to bed hungry.
Over the last few months, you have welcomed me into your living rooms and backyards at over 190 meet and greets. You shared your fears with me, but more importantly, you shared your unshakeable hope.
And yes, I am deeply grateful for the financial support you've entrusted to us. I know that every dollar you give is a sacrifice.
Because of your generosity, we have the resources not just to run ads, but to serve. You have allowed us to do the work now, long before Election Day ever arrives.
Thank you for believing that we can be better. Thank you for fueling this movement with your hard-earned money and your trust.
You are the reason I have hope.
From my family to yours, have a wonderful, restful Thanksgiving.
With love and gratitude,
---
| |
---
| Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-09
---
| |
---
| |
---

body:
Happy Thanksgiving!
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013byNOkkGxePS8OZjccDku-xtUJcWHQ-5WrT5yxS9cbwcWvFoH7hMRiygrrW5SQRQW0kvw0S4_Ch4EPxCgTEUDeelEjKI_in4NXKwr-iXgC6EA09qB-QxwERNniPMYk4hZmcA13umj4iIheK55peo_UWUV4oxlFb_9FtGhC8JRP8q_YB0pqMSZOZ-WMPOkAAYVRuhxUBGfYRbD31rGVm2PA1PRY5yD5AUc-FfDn1H9BM=&c=q736hlr43yHEYtTy5gWAbR5JI3GZUolI5Dk1xOK_jNB5ZBcRQUis-A==&ch=bdjLWgaHf704_gODTfemsFnfKBZOhRkDM1FnjgfC1NFxOuZZ1YtR1Q==)
